transcription.text: Riverside Mechanics, this is Tom. Hey Tom, it's Lisa. I need my 30,000 mile service on my 2023 Mazda CX-5. What does that include and how much? Great question. It's an oil change, tire rotation, brake inspection, cabin and engine air filters, and a multi-point inspection. Package price is $289. That's actually cheaper than the dealer quoted me. Can I come in Monday? Monday works great. How about 8:30 AM? Perfect. You guys are always so easy to work with. We appreciate you, Lisa. See you Monday!
transcription.summary:
## Call Summary

Repeat customer Lisa called for 30K mile service on 2023 Mazda CX-5. Package price $289. Appointment booked Monday 8:30 AM. Customer noted price is cheaper than dealer.
